languages.text: "Император благоволит нам, несмотря на наши грехи! Когда мы нашли сие убежище, запасы провизии ломили стеллажи хранилища. Вода, медикаменты, техника, оружие и инструменты — вот главная цель наших поисков. К тому же бичи божьи и еретики достаточно хитры, чтобы отравить припасы. Мы предпочитаем не рисковать, пока есть иной выбор..."

traits.locale_text: "Император благоволит нам, несмотря на наши грехи! Когда мы нашли сие убежище, запасы провизии ломили стеллажи хранилища. Вода, медикаменты, техника, оружие и инструменты — вот главная цель наших поисков. К тому же бичи божьи и еретики достаточно хитры, чтобы отравить припасы. Мы предпочитаем не рисковать, пока есть иной выбор..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."
languages.original_text: "Император благоволит нам, несмотря на наши грехи! Когда мы нашли сие убежище, запасы провизии ломили стеллажи хранилища. Вода, медикаменты, техника, оружие и инструменты — вот главная цель наших поисков. К тому же бичи божьи и еретики достаточно хитры, чтобы отравить припасы. Мы предпочитаем не рисковать, пока есть иной выбор..."

traits.locale_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Der Kaiser ist uns trotz all unserer Fehler wohlgesonnen! Als wir diesen Unterschlupf entdeckten, knarrten seine Regale unter dem Gewicht der Vorräte. Wasser, Medizin, Geräte, Werkzeuge und Waffen sind das, was wir am meisten suchen. Und außerdem sind Geißeln und Ketzer schlau genug, die Vorräte zu vergiften. Wir ziehen es vor, Risiken zu vermeiden, solange es einen anderen Weg gibt..."
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."

languages.text: "L'Empereur nous favorise malgré toutes nos fautes ! Lorsque nous avons découvert cet abri, ses étagères grinçaient sous le poids des provisions. Eau, médicaments, appareils, outils et armes, voilà ce que nous recherchons avant tout. Et puis, les fléaux et les hérétiques sont assez malins pour empoisonner les provisions. Nous préférons éviter les risques tant qu'il y a un autre moyen..."
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."

languages.text: "皇帝眷顾我们，尽管我们有种种过错！当我们发现这个避难所时，它的架子已经被物资压得吱吱作响。水、药品、设备、工具和武器才是我们要找的东西。此外，祸害和异教徒很聪明，他们会在物资中下毒。只要有其他办法，我们宁愿避免风险......"
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."

languages.text: "¡El Emperador nos favorece a pesar de todos nuestros defectos! Cuando descubrimos este refugio, sus estanterías crujían por el peso de las provisiones. Agua, medicinas, artefactos, herramientas y armas es lo que más buscamos. Además, las plagas y los herejes son lo bastante astutos como para envenenar las provisiones. Preferimos evitar riesgos mientras haya otro camino..."
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."

languages.text: "皇帝は、私たちの欠点にもかかわらず、私たちに好意を寄せてくださる！私たちがこのシェルターを発見したとき、その棚は食料の重さできしんでいた。水、薬、器具、道具、武器が私たちの主な探し物だ。それに、災いや異端者は物資に毒を盛るほど賢い。別の方法がある限り、危険は避けたい......"
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."

languages.text: "İmparator tüm hatalarımıza rağmen bizi kayırıyor! Bu sığınağı keşfettiğimizde rafları erzakların ağırlığından gıcırdıyordu. Su, ilaç, cihazlar, aletler ve silahlar en çok aradığımız şeyler. Ayrıca, belalar ve kafirler erzakları zehirleyecek kadar zekiler. Başka bir yol olduğu sürece risklerden kaçınmayı tercih ediyoruz..."
languages.original_text: "The Emperor favours us despite all our faults! When we discovered this shelter, its shelves were creaking from the weight of provisions. Water, medicine, devices, tools and weapons are what we are mostly looking for. And besides, scourges and heretics are clever enough to poison the supplies. We prefer to avoid risks as long as there is another way..."
